# Amazon Q Developer - What is Amazon Q Developer?

## Core Capabilities
- Generative AI-powered conversational assistant
- Helps understand, build, extend, and operate AWS applications
- Answers questions about AWS architecture, resources, best practices, documentation, and support
- Powered by Amazon Bedrock

## IDE Capabilities
- Chat about code
- Inline code completions
- Generate new code
- Code security vulnerability scanning
- Code upgrades and improvements
- Language updates
- Debugging assistance
- Optimization capabilities

## Getting Started Methods

### AWS Apps and Websites
- AWS Management Console
- AWS Documentation website
- AWS website
- AWS Console Mobile Application

### IDEs (Free with AWS Builder ID)
- Visual Studio Code
- JetBrains IDEs
- AWS Toolkit for Visual Studio
- Eclipse IDEs (Preview)

### Chat Applications
- Microsoft Teams
- Slack

## Pricing
- Free tier available
- Pro subscription: Amazon Q Developer Pro

## Authentication
- AWS Builder ID (no AWS account required for IDE access)
- IAM identity permissions for AWS apps/websites

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-12. No changes detected from previous scan.
